description: lastminute.com is an online travel service for booking flights, hotels, holiday packages, and related travel products. Its public web presence also includes developer-facing endpoints for an MCP server and a documented API host.
summary: lastminute.com exposes a public MCP server at https://mcp.lastminute.com/mcp and a discovered HTTP API surface at https://romulo-api.lastminute.com documented via Swagger UI; authentication for the HTTP API could not be determined from public docs.
